name: Wish Upon A Star
original_name: คืนนั้นฉันมองเห็นดาวด้วยตาเปล่า
overview: A story of two young women who share the name. After the Dao who shines so bright tragically loses her life, forgotten and lonely Dao travels back in time to high school to save her life. In order to do succeed, she'll have to find the courage to do what she never dared to and stand by her side.

trailers.title: คืนนั้นฉันมองเห็นดาวด้วยตาเปล่า Wish upon a star | GMMTV 2026
